title: 🦞 Discord - OpenClaw
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# Discord. Ready for DMs and guild channels via the official Discord gateway. Discord DMs default to pairing mode. You will need to create a new application with a bot, add the bot to your server, and pair it to OpenClaw. ### Create a Discord application and bot. Set the **Username** to whatever you call your OpenClaw agent. This is your **Bot Token** and you will need it shortly. You'll generate an invite URL with the right permissions to add the bot to your server. ### Enable Developer Mode and collect your IDs. Back in the Discord app, you need to enable Developer Mode so you can copy internal IDs. Save your **Server ID** and **User ID** alongside your Bot Token — you'll send all three to OpenClaw in the next step. For pairing to work, Discord needs to allow your bot to DM you. Use `channels.discord.applicationId` for the default account, or `channels.discord.accounts.<accountId>.applicationId` when you run multiple Discord bots.

title: 🦞 Cron - OpenClaw Docs
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

They do not affect retry backoff, but `openclaw cron edit <job-id> --failure-alert-include-skipped` can opt failure alerts into repeated skipped-run notifications. For isolated jobs that target a local configured model provider, cron runs a lightweight provider preflight before starting the agent turn. `openclaw cron run <job-id>` force-runs by default and returns as soon as the manual run is queued. openclaw cron run <job-id> --wait --wait-timeout 10m --poll-interval 2s. If you have cron jobs from before the current delivery and store format, run `openclaw doctor --fix`. openclaw cron edit <job-id> --announce --channel telegram --to "123456789". openclaw cron edit <job-id> --no-deliver. openclaw cron edit <job-id> --announce --channel slack --to "channel:C1234567890". openclaw cron edit <job-id> --announce --channel telegram --to "-1001234567890" --thread-id 42. *   [Scheduled tasks](https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/cron-jobs). title: 🦞 OpenClaw cron scheduler guide with main and isolated runs - LumaDock
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# OpenClaw cron scheduler guide with main and isolated runs. OpenClaw cron scheduler guide with main and isolated runs - OpenClaw cron scheduler guide with main and isolated runs. That’s what the built-in cron scheduler is for. It runs inside the Gateway process so you don’t need a separate job runner and it can deliver results straight back to Telegram WhatsApp Slack Discord and more. This isn’t just “run a script at 7 AM.” It’s “wake the agent run a prompt or drop a system event into the main session then deliver output where I will actually see it.”. OpenClaw cron is a scheduler that lives inside the Gateway. You can send the same job output to a private Telegram chat and also to a Slack channel if you want. Another one is a weekly review that runs in a clean isolated session and only posts the final result back to you.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw: Scheduled tasks
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# List all jobsopenclaw cron list # Get one stored job as JSONopenclaw cron get <jobId> # Show one job, including resolved delivery routeopenclaw cron show <jobId> # Edit a jobopenclaw cron edit <jobId> --message "Updated prompt" --model "opus" # Force run a job nowopenclaw cron run <jobId> # Force run a job now and wait for its terminal statusopenclaw cron run <jobId> --wait --wait-timeout 10m --poll-interval 2s # Run only if dueopenclaw cron run <jobId> --due # View run historyopenclaw cron runs --id <jobId> --limit 50 # View one exact runopenclaw cron runs --id <jobId> --run-id <runId> # Delete a jobopenclaw cron remove <jobId> # Agent selection (multi-agent setups)openclaw cron create "0 6 * * *" "Check ops queue" --name "Ops sweep" --session isolated --agent opsopenclaw cron edit <jobId> --clear-agent. [Quick start](https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/cron-jobs#quick-start)[How cron works](https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/cron-jobs#how-cron-works)[Schedule types](https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/cron-jobs#schedule-types)[Day-of-month and day-of-week use OR logic](https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/cron-jobs#day-of-month-and-day-of-week-use-or-logic)[Execution styles](https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/cron-jobs#execution-styles)[Payload options for isolated jobs](https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/cron-jobs#payload-options-for-isolated-jobs)[Delivery and output](https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/cron-jobs#delivery-and-output)[Output language](https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/cron-jobs#output-language)[CLI examples](https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/cron-jobs#cli-examples)[Webhooks](https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/cron-jobs#webhooks)[Authentication](https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/cron-jobs#authentication)[Gmail PubSub integration](https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/cron-jobs#gmail-pubsub-integration)[Wizard setup (recommended)](https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/cron-jobs#wizard-setup-(recommended))[Gateway auto-start](https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/cron-jobs#gateway-auto-start)[Manual one-time setup](https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/cron-jobs#manual-one-time-setup)[Gmail model override](https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/cron-jobs#gmail-model-override)[Managing jobs](https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/cron-jobs#managing-jobs)[Configuration](https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/cron-jobs#configuration)[Troubleshooting](https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/cron-jobs#troubleshooting)[Command ladder](https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/cron-jobs#command-ladder)[Related](https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/cron-jobs#related).
